# Data file contents: Daily temperatures (TEMP1 (10:00), TEMP2 (14:00), MIN, MAX)
# for June 1 - August 31, 2022
# Data source: MeteoSwiss Open Government Data (OGD), station KLO (Kloten / Zurich Airport)
# Source URL (hourly data): https://data.geo.admin.ch/ch.meteoschweiz.ogd-smn/klo/ogd-smn_klo_h_historical_2020-2029.csv
# Data processing: Extracted hourly air temperature (tre200h0), aggregated to daily values,
# computed daily minimum and maximum temperatures, and extracted temperatures at 10:00 (TEMP1)
# and 14:00 (TEMP2); formatted as comma-separated values and created YEARMODA identifier
#
# Processed by Hendrik Wulf, 17.03.2026

YEARMODA,MAX,MIN,TEMP1,TEMP2
